query:
SELECT ac.name as category, COUNT(*) as cnt 
FROM animals a 
JOIN animal_categories ac ON a.categoryId=ac.id 
WHERE a.isActive=1 AND a.deletedAt IS NULL 
GROUP BY ac.name ORDER BY cnt DESC;
